# `PrintString`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET, X16  
**Parameters:** `s,b,b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Prints a zero-terminated string [ parameter 1 ] shifted with [ parameter 2] bytes with maximum length given in parameter 3. Example:
<code>
var
	text: string = ("THIS IS A STRING");

begin
	// Move to x,y = 5,5 at bank 0 
        moveto(5,5,hi(#screen_char_loc));
        printstring(#text,1,3); // prints "HIS"
end.
</code> 


</div>
